name: GEOFlow 04 Red Opinion
description: A concise opinion-led variant with assertive red accents and compact editorial structure. Preserves GEOFlow frontend data contracts and derives from the NetEase News Inspired base theme.
notes: Generated as a high-level visual variant inspired by The Economist. It does not copy logos, assets, content, or proprietary source code.
Keeps GEOFlow Blade variables, SEO meta fields, JSON-LD schema output, category navigation, article routes, and markdown HTML rendering intact.
Visual differences are concentrated in theme.css and documented in tokens.json for future maintenance.
